original: The sacred Spiritstone!\n\n...Well, in actuality, this is essentially a savicite dildo. Carved and smoothed straight from Uvetan stone, this above average-sized, glowing-green sex toy is guaranteed to provide you, or a partner, the most intense stimulation, thanks to its naturally strong lust-making qualities! It is shaped in canine fashion, just like a korgonne’s, knot and all!
